overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street at dusk, featuring towering industrial buildings, digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's distinctive neon-lit architecture and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with digital advertising walls

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a busy multi-lane road, passing illuminated digital billboards on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the road

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screen displaying various cyberpunk-style advertisements with neon colors
tall industrial building with prominent 07 signage and metal framework
horizontal orange light bars extending over the street
yellow and black striped concrete barrier separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. Large digital billboards line the right side displaying cyberpunk advertisements, while a road with moderate traffic runs parallel on the left. Ahead, an industrial building with 07 signage looms in the distance under a clear dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban street with scaffolding-covered building

events.description: camera moves closer to the industrial building, revealing detailed scaffolding structure
multiple futuristic vehicles pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing close to the industrial building with visible metal scaffolding and 07 signage

notable_agents.action: dark colored futuristic car driving past quickly

entered.detail: metal framework and construction scaffolding covering the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the digital billboards and alongside the industrial building with 07 signage. The building's detailed metal scaffolding becomes prominent on the right. Vehicles continue to pass on the left as the walkway curves slightly around the structure.

events.description: moving past the industrial building into a more open area with wider street views
white futuristic sports car drives past on the road

agents.ego_description: walking past the industrial building into a more open stretch, approaching an intersection with large billboards visible ahead

entered.detail: massive dark industrial building with illuminated windows and Japanese architectural elements
tall industrial structure with smokestacks and antennae in the distance
multiple large advertising screens at the upcoming intersection displaying various brands

segments.scene_description: Having passed the industrial building, the scene opens into a wider urban thoroughfare. A massive building with Japanese-inspired architecture dominates the left side, while ahead, a cluster of digital billboards marks an upcoming intersection. The distant industrial tower remains visible against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching overpass bridge with police advertisement

events.description: approaching the metal overpass bridge structure spanning the road
police billboard temporarily fills the right side of the frame as camera passes close by

agents.ego_description: approaching the overpass bridge, passing a police recruitment billboard on the right while vehicles drive underneath the gantry

notable_agents.action: white futuristic car driving under the overpass ahead

entered.detail: metal bridge structure with support beams spanning across the road ahead
large advertisement showing police officer and vehicle with recruitment text
overhead road sign structure with directional arrows suspended over lanes

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a large metal overpass bridge spanning the multi-lane road. A prominent police recruitment billboard appears on the right, while the traffic gantry and overpass structure dominate the center view. Vehicles continue to pass beneath the overhead signs as the camera moves steadily forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a futuristic city sidewalk that transitions from a corridor of digital advertisements into a wide, industrial urban thoroughfare. It begins by walking past glowing cyberpunk billboards on the right and moderate traffic on the left, moving steadily toward a distant industrial building marked with 07 signage. As the camera passes this structure, the view shifts to emphasize detailed metal scaffolding on the right before the walkway curves to open into a broader street dominated by Japanese-inspired architecture. The scene then expands toward a cluster of intersection billboards and a distant tower under the dusk sky, before finally approaching a massive metal overpass bridge. The movement concludes as the camera glides beneath a traffic gantry and a prominent police recruitment billboard, with vehicles continuing to flow under the overhead structures.
